hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Malignant neoplasm of head of pancreas - pylorus-preserving pancreaticoduodenectomy
hospitalizations.reason: Planned Whipple procedure (pylorus-preserving pancreaticoduodenectomy) complicated by Grade B postoperative pancreatic fistula and Grade B delayed gastric emptying; managed with prolonged drain placement, TPN, octreotide, and nasogastric decompression

hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Toxic gastroenteritis and colitis - severe chemotherapy-induced diarrhea
hospitalizations.reason: Grade 3 diarrhea and dehydration during cycle 2 of nanoliposomal irinotecan plus 5-FU/LV; required IV hydration and electrolyte repletion; associated Grade 3 neutropenia (ANC 0.6) without fever

medications.frequency: twice daily, days 1-21 of a 28-day cycle
